# MDE 1.5.1

## Features

- None.

## Bug Fixes

- Fixed a regression where switching the app language while a Markdown document was open could leave the editor body visually empty.
- Protected blur-save handling from transient empty BlockNote serialization during language/settings transitions, so a non-empty draft is not replaced by an empty save.
- Restored the current Markdown draft into BlockNote after app-language text changes so unsaved editor content remains visible.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Added focused editor hydration logic for deciding when persisted Markdown should be re-imported into BlockNote.
- Added unit, integration, and E2E regression coverage for language switching with an active editor draft.

## Documentation

- User manual unchanged. This release fixes an editor data-loss/display regression without changing the documented language switching or editing workflow.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npx playwright test tests/e2e/markdown-editor.e2e.test.ts -g "keeps editor contents visible when switching the app language"`
- `npm run test:e2e`

## Artifacts

- macOS DMG and ZIP artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow. If signing secrets are not configured, macOS artifacts are unsigned.
- Windows NSIS installer and updater artifacts are produced by the GitHub Release workflow.
